related_questions.question: What exactly is coffee?
related_questions.snippet: Coffee is a brewed drink prepared from roasted coffee beans, the seeds of berries from certain flowering plants in the Coffea genus.
related_questions.title: Coffee - Wikipedia

related_questions.question: Is coffee good for you?
related_questions.snippet: Moderate coffee consumption (3-4 cups per day) is associated with a lower risk of several chronic diseases.
related_questions.title: Coffee and Health

related_questions.question: What are the 4 types of coffee?
related_questions.snippet: The four main types of coffee beans are Arabica, Robusta, Liberica, and Excelsa.
related_questions.title: Coffee Bean Types

related_questions.question: Why do people drink coffee?
related_questions.snippet: People drink coffee primarily for its caffeine content, which provides a temporary boost in alertness and energy.
related_questions.title: Why Coffee

related_questions.question: Is coffee a fruit?
related_questions.snippet: The coffee bean is technically the pit of a fruit called the coffee cherry.
related_questions.title: Coffee Cherry
